title: anthoxanthum moorei
intro: Anthoxanthum moorei, also known as sweet grass or buffalo grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Anthoxanthum moorei include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Anthoxanthum moorei can be found in the form of essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used for aromatherapy, topical applications, or as a dietary supplement.
